title: vicia janeae
intro: Vicia janeae, also known as Jane's vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Traditionally, Jane's vetch is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
